raw_consumer_statement: I completed a return of the mattress on XX/XX/XXXX it is now XX/XX/XXXX and I still haven't received my refund for {$670.00}. Between wayfair credit card and wayfair customer service NOONE has contacted me to get this resolved and whenever I call in I'm being ran in circles trying to get my money back. This has been a horrible experience from start to finish!!!!!! I just want my money refunded so I can be done with both of these companies
